CustomField.formula:
CASE( text(leaseworks__Type__c) , 'Airframe', 1 , 'Engine 1', 4 , 'Engine 1 LLP', 5 , 'Engine 2', 6 , 'Engine 2 LLP', 7 , 'Engine 3', 8 , 'Engine 3 LLP', 9 , 'Engine 4', 10 , 'Engine 4 LLP', 11
, 'APU', 20 , 'Landing Gear - Nose' , 21 , 'Landing Gear - Left Main' , 22 , 'Landing Gear - Right Main' , 23 , 'Landing Gear - Left Wing' , 24 , 'Landing Gear - Right Wing' , 25 , 99999)
CustomField.label: Order By
